phase_ref.label: Phase
phase_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Phasen' with the id `69c54571f147e4e484ea484e` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69c54571f147e4e484ea484e/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

vorlage_name.label: Name der Vorlage / des Tools

tool_typ.label: Typ

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.
